sentences.target: Ich rufe morgen bei der Verwaltung an.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʁuːfə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ baɪ deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈvaltʊŋ an/

translations.de: Ich rufe morgen bei der Verwaltung an.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʁuːfə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ baɪ deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈvaltʊŋ an/
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天会打电话给行政办公室。
translations.yue: 我聽日會打電話去行政部門。
translations.pt: Amanhã vou ligar para a administração.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi sẽ gọi cho phòng hành chính.
translations.hi: मैं कल प्रशासन को फोन करूँगा।
translations.id: Besok saya akan menelepon bagian administrasi.
translations.da: Jeg ringer til forvaltningen i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日、役所に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; forms a separable verb with the particle 'an' ('anrufen' = to call by phone).
Temporal adverb modifying the verb, indicating the time of the action.
Preposition selecting dative; marks location at an institution.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Verwaltung' as the object of 'bei'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular governed by 'bei'; complement of the preposition.
Separable verb particle completing 'rufe' to 'anrufen'.

sentences.target: Er arbeitet in der Verwaltung in Berlin.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪtət ɪn deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈvaltʊŋ ɪn bɛʁˈliːn/

translations.de: Er arbeitet in der Verwaltung in Berlin.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ˈaʁbaɪtət ɪn deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈvaltʊŋ ɪn bɛʁˈliːn/
translations.en: He works in the administration in Berlin.
translations.es: Trabaja en la administración de Berlín.
translations.fr: Il travaille dans l'administration à Berlin.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在柏林的行政部门工作。
translations.yue: 佢喺柏林嘅行政部門做嘢。
translations.ru: Он работает в администрации в Берлине.
translations.pt: Ele trabalha na administração em Berlim.
translations.vi: Anh ấy làm ở bộ phận hành chính tại Berlin.
translations.ar: هو يعمل في الإدارة في برلين.
translations.nl: Hij werkt bij de administratie in Berlijn.
translations.uk: Він працює в адміністрації в Берліні.
translations.hi: वह बर्लिन में प्रशासन में काम करता है।
translations.pl: On pracuje w administracji w Berlinie.
translations.nb: Han jobber i administrasjonen i Berlin.
translations.id: Dia bekerja di bagian administrasi di Berlin.
translations.sv: Han jobbar på förvaltningen i Berlin.
translations.ro: El lucrează la administrație în Berlin.
translations.da: Han arbejder i forvaltningen i Berlin.
translations.ja: 彼はベルリンの役所で働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition; here with locative meaning selecting dative (static location).
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Verwaltung' as complement of 'in'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as object of the preposition 'in'.
Preposition introducing a second locative phrase.
Proper noun; complement of 'in', indicating the city.

sentences.target: Die Verwaltung ist heute leider geschlossen.

translations.de: Die Verwaltung ist heute leider geschlossen.
translations.en: The administration is closed today, unfortunately.
translations.es: Hoy la administración está cerrada, por desgracia.
translations.ko: 오늘은 아쉽게도 행정 부서가 문을 닫았어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 行政办公室今天很遗憾关门了。
translations.yue: 可惜今日行政部門唔開門。
translations.pt: Infelizmente, a administração está fechada hoje.
translations.vi: Tiếc là hôm nay phòng hành chính đóng cửa.
translations.nl: Helaas is de administratie vandaag gesloten.
translations.hu: Sajnos ma zárva van a hivatal.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς, η διοίκηση είναι κλειστή σήμερα.
translations.nb: Dessverre er administrasjonen stengt i dag.
translations.id: Sayangnya, bagian administrasi tutup hari ini.
translations.sv: Tyvärr är förvaltningen stängd i dag.
translations.ro: Din păcate, administrația este închisă astăzi.
translations.da: Desværre er forvaltningen lukket i dag.
translations.ja: 残念ですが、今日は役所は休みです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary (copula), present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Sentential/stance adverb expressing speaker attitude.
Predicative adjective (past participle form used adjectivally) serving as predicate complement.

sentences.target: Ich gebe das Formular in der Verwaltung ab.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈɡeːbə das fɔʁmuˈlaːʁ ɪn deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈvaltʊŋ ap/

translations.de: Ich gebe das Formular in der Verwaltung ab.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈɡeːbə das fɔʁmuˈlaːʁ ɪn deːɐ̯ fɛɐ̯ˈvaltʊŋ ap/
translations.en: I’m handing in the form at the administration office.
translations.es: Entrego el formulario en la administración.
translations.fr: Je dépose le formulaire à l'administration.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在行政办公室交表格。
translations.vi: Tôi nộp mẫu đơn ở phòng hành chính.
translations.nl: Ik lever het formulier in bij de administratie.
translations.hu: A hivatalban adom le az űrlapot.
translations.hi: मैं प्रशासन में फ़ॉर्म जमा कर रहा हूँ।
translations.id: Saya menyerahkan formulir di bagian administrasi.
translations.sv: Jag lämnar in blanketten till förvaltningen.
translations.ja: 役所に書類を提出します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
